steps.title: Identify corresponding angles from the similarity statement
steps.content: The statement triangle CAE is similar to triangle CBD specifies the vertex correspondence through the order given: $C \leftrightarrow C$, $A \leftrightarrow B$, $E \leftrightarrow D$. This means that angle $CAE$ in triangle $CAE$ corresponds to angle $CBD$ in triangle $CBD$.

steps.title: Apply the equal angles property
steps.content: Since corresponding angles in similar triangles are congruent: $$\angle CAE = \angle CBD = 57°$$ That matches choice C — C is correct.
